name: planboard-sync
description: Synced planner calendar and todo PWA

scripts.check: python -c "import ast,pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('server.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'), 'server.py')" && node --check planboard-domain.js && node --check portfolio-utils.js && node --check planboard-api-client.js && node --check app.js && node --check firebase-adapter.js && node --check sw.js && node --check scripts/prepare-web.js && node --check write-native-config.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js
scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests && npm run test:js
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run prepare:web && electron-builder --win portable nsis
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run prepare:web && cap sync ios
